• Interactive Magic 8 Ball with 3D WebGL particles and shaking animations
  • Supports 5 selectable answer personalities (friendly, mean, silly, dramatic, roast)
  • Fetches short AI responses via OpenRouter, auto-reverts to default after 45s
    magicBall.classList.add('is-shaking');
    responseText.innerHTML = htmlContent;

This interactive Magic 8 Ball web app uses 3D particle effects and animations for immersive feedback. Users input questions, select answer personality styles, and receive AI-generated responses via the OpenRouter API. The interface auto-reverts to the default 8 display after 45 seconds, with smooth text transitions and shaking effects.
